raw.message: Deine Pikmin begleiten dich, egal, wohin du gehst.

hook.summary: Showcase of cute fast-food themed Pikmin characters.
hook.visual_action: Rapid cuts between a burger-red Pikmin, fries-yellow Pikmin, and drink-blue Pikmin against a clean white background.

scene_flow: Sequential showcase of three fast-food themed Decor Pikmin.
Text prompt asking which Pikmin the player will meet today.
In-game footage showing the player walking and planting flowers on a map.
Discovery animation of a Burger Decor Pikmin appearing in a field.
End card with game logo and download call-to-action.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers and Nintendo fans who enjoy cute collectibles and walking-based gameplay.
